Hero.title: Trusted Construction Materials & Heavy Equipment Solutions in Bali
Hero.subtitle: Bali Limestone is a leading supplier of limestone, fill soil, foundation stones, and sand. We also provide heavy equipment and dump truck rental services for medium to large-scale construction projects across Bali.

About.title: About Us
About.description: Bali Limestone is a trusted construction material supplier based in Bali, Indonesia. With over 10 years of experience, we have successfully completed more than 1,000 projects — from residential homes to large commercial developments across the island. We provide premium limestone, fill soil, foundation stones, sand, and heavy equipment rental services tailored to every project scale.

Services.sectionSubtitle: From land preparation and excavation to clearing, demolition, material supply, and heavy equipment rental — Bali Limestone is your one-stop construction partner across Bali.
